title: Fair After Foul.
content:
Tears quickly dry, griefs will in time decay:
    A clear will come after a cloudy day.
meaning:
This evocative piece by Robert Herrick, titled "Fair After Foul.", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
